summary: Finished PostgreSQL migration for PG-002. Key accomplishments: (1) Created coordination.pg.sql.ts with pgTable definitions for 3 coordination tables matching existing sqliteTable schemas, using jsonb() for native PG JSON support. (2) Regenerated PG migrations via drizzle-kit generate — added 2 new migrations (coordination tables + task_ids type fix). (3) Consolidated duplicate schema-pg.ts (identical to schema.ts, both already exported from .pg.sql.ts). (4) Added package.json scripts: db:generate:pg, db:migrate:pg, test:pg:all, test:pg:ci. (5) Added Postgres CI job to test.yml with postgres:17 service container. (6) Updated roadmap: PG-002 marked completed at 100%. (7) All PG tests pass (migration.pg.test.ts, adapter.pg.test.ts, migrate.test.ts).
